eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Snohomish, WA; at 02:38 PM ON FEB 9, 2026 Effective until 03:08 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test, only a test, of the Emergency Alert System, from the Snohomish County Department of Emergency Management. Had this been an actual alert, this system would bring you important information. No action needed. This is only a test.
